summary: CI/CD process is configured correctly but blocked by Coolify server-side permission issues
problem: Coolify server cannot write .env and docker-compose.yaml files due to permission denied errors
fixes_applied: Updated nixpacks.toml with proper Node.js configuration
Fixed Dockerfile.coolify to use non-root user (UID 1001)
Added proper health checks and environment variables
Ensured application builds and runs correctly locally
next_required_actions: Contact Coolify administrator to fix server directory permissions
Verify /data/coolify/applications/ directory is writable by coolify user
Check if Coolify instance has proper filesystem permissions
Consider redeploying once server permissions are fixed
commits_deployed: 971ebcc - Fixed all syntax and build issues
